INDEX - The solution provider for e-mobility.
Many of the integral parts that make your E-Mobility wheels turn are an absolute best fit for production on INDEX and TRAUB machines. Watch our G and MS Series machines perform diverse and complex machining operations to cut complex electric vehicle drive components in just one cycle.

iXshop: All from a single source
The equipment portal for turning machines. The iXshop offers you precisely fitting accessories like tool holders, spindle reductions or clamping devices for your machine tool. Optimize your procurement process with the iXshop.
